tool_args.label: NYCT Key Performance Metrics - December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS, December 2025

payload.source_name: NYCT Key Performance Metrics Committee Book
payload.document_title: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.prepared_for: October 2025 meeting of the New York City Transit & Bus Committee

tool_args.label: Demetrius Crichlow, President of New York City Transit
tool_args.raw_text: Demetrius Crichlow President New York City Transit

payload.name: Demetrius Crichlow
payload.title: President of New York City Transit

tool_args.label: New York City Transit (NYCT)
tool_args.raw_text: New York City Transit and MTA Bus operate all subways and buses in New York City. Our 45,000 employees serve 4,500,000 passengers a day. We operate nearly 6,700 subway cars and 5,800 buses, and we maintain 472 subway stations, 640 miles of track, 27 bus depots and 70 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
tool_args.raw_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000-square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: NYC Transit Committee Members
tool_args.raw_text: Members of the New York City Transit Committee include: Haeda Mihaltses, Chair; Andrew Albert; Samuel Chu; Dan Garodnick; David Jones; Melva Miller; John Ross 'JR' Rizzo; John Samuelsen; Lisa Sorin; Midori Valdivia

tool_args.label: Church Avenue Station Upgrades
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA is continuing to make the subway system accessible for all faster than ever before. On November 25, 2025, the MTA celebrated the completion of station and accessibility upgrades at the 118-year-old Church Av Station in Brooklyn, including opening a new entrance mid-block on East 18th St.

tool_args.label: F/M Route Swap Implementation
tool_args.raw_text: On Monday, December 8th, we implemented the first permanent change to the subway network since 2017 by swapping the routes the F and M take between Queens and Manhattan during the week.

payload.description: Permanent swap of F and M routes between Queens and Manhattan

tool_args.label: New Post-Pandemic Ridership Record December 4, 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Transit achieved a new post-pandemic ridership record in December, hitting over 4.6 million riders on Wednesday, December 4

payload.description: New post-pandemic ridership record of over 4.6 million riders

payload.description: TCS NYC Marathon weekend produced record-setting subway ridership

tool_args.raw_text: This month we'll install platform barriers at the 100th subway station

tool_args.raw_text: we'll finish installing brighter LED lights at all 472 subway stations

tool_args.label: Railcar Acceptance and Testing Facility
tool_args.raw_text: Transit celebrated the opening of the first-of-its-kind Railcar Acceptance and Testing Facility. The facility, located in Sunset Park, Brooklyn, can accept new cars by truck, rail, and barge, and even has access to the mainline tracks. Every new car Transit receives will come through this place, and we expect to process 30 new railcars a month here.

payload.description: First-of-its-kind full-scale subway car facility, first brand new facility on new property added to the network in 77 years

tool_args.label: Customer Service Center (CSC) Network
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT launched a network of Customer Service Centers (CSCs) beginning in 2023. The first 15 CSCs opened between 2022 and 2024. In 2025, NYCT has opened an additional six locations with nine more to open by the end of the year.

payload.description: Network of 24/7 staffed Customer Service Centers for fare payment support and travel information

tool_args.label: Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE) Program
tool_args.raw_text: Since its launch in June 2024, the program has extended across all five boroughs, equipping more than 1,400 buses and covering 560 miles of service, benefitting over 915,000 daily customers.

tool_args.label: 34 Elevator Replacements Completed in 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA has completed 34 elevator replacements in 2025.

tool_args.label: B Line Schedule Improvement November 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The B 's new schedule improved our resilience to incidents and helped trains stay on time across the line, significantly reducing customer wait times across November.

payload.claim_text: The B's new schedule improved resilience to incidents and helped trains stay on time, significantly reducing customer wait times in November 2025.
payload.description: Schedule update on B line improved incident resilience and on-time performance

tool_args.label: C Line Schedule Improvement November 2025

payload.description: Schedule update on C line improved OTP by 9.0 percentage points
